reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We are bicycle travelers and this is the first time in Argentina that we have been so badly received! It's a shame.

(Original)
Nous sommes voyageurs à vélo et c est la première fois en Argentine que nous sommes aussi mal reçus ! C’est une honte.

reviews.comment:
Aplausos para el ACA. Una estación nueva en un lugar súper recóndito y pintoresco de Catamarca. La atención impecable por el único empleado. Da gusto encontrarse con un servicio de esa calidad en un rincón tan hermoso y alejado de las grandes urbes.

(Translated by Google)
Applause for the ACA. A new station in a super-seen and picturesque part of Catamarca. The service is impeccable by the sole employee. It's a pleasure to find such quality service in such a beautiful corner far from the big cities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvNnRPWmRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente! La mejor atención en todas las YPF que recorri. No se vayan nunca!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! The best service in all the YPF stores I've been to. Don't ever leave!

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Cozy, clean, and pleasant place. They should improve the online connection for credit cards and Serviclub.
